headline: KKR Leans Into Sports With Arctos Deal And Insider Share Buying
summary: KKR (NYSE:KKR) has agreed to acquire Arctos Partners, a specialist investor in professional sports franchises and related assets. The deal is intended to expand KKR's exposure to sports, real estate, and media rights through Arctos' existing platform. Alongside the acquisition, KKR's Co CEOs and board members have recently made significant insider share purchases. At a share price of $91.33, NYSE:KKR is coming off a mixed stretch, with the stock up 4.2% over the past week but showing a...
